planned_changes.description: Execute solubility_calibration.ipynb end-to-end in an isolated, fresh environment (preferably a clean Python container). Capture stdout, stderr, and any generated files. Ensure the run reproduces the metrics reported in model_card.md and actual_outputs.json.

Add intermediate_calculations.csv artifact containing per-record computed fields (record_id, pred_logS, observed_logS, residual, abs_residual, residual_pct, leverage_score, pred>limit, obs>limit, pH>limit, needs_review). Ensure exact numeric formatting matches notebook computations.

Untruncate and update [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] to include the full decision table and all sensitivity rows; verify no preview truncation in artifact previews by keeping lines explicit and avoiding inline long tables without breaks.

Add expert_review_memo.md summarizing deterministic choices, environment fallback (numpy not available), the reasoning for using stdlib math, and instructions for re-running the notebook. Cite exact cell outputs and file paths for intermediate_calculations.csv and actual_outputs.json.

Modify the notebook to include a final deterministic write-out cell that writes intermediate_calculations.csv and actual_outputs.json and a requirements/comment cell describing optional dependencies and the pure-stdlib fallback. Include a brief verification cell that prints a checksum (e.g., SHA256) of the written actual_outputs.json for easy parity checks.

Resubmit the revised attempt with updated artifacts: solubility_calibration.ipynb, [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] (untruncated), intermediate_calculations.csv, expert_review_memo.md, and actual_outputs.json from the end-to-end run. Request verifier re-check.
